XenotypeDef.label: s'nuffy
XenotypeDef.description: A stabilized S'Lanter-derived companion strain created through West Tek behavioral engineering and pre-war social compatibility trials. Unlike their hidden kin, S'Nuffies were altered to live openly among human communities: empathic, affectionate, attractive, and unusually gifted at social bonding. Their raccoon ancestry remains visible in their ears, tail, night vision, animal empathy, and scavenger digestion, but the strain trades the S'Lanter's burrowing instincts and wasteland roughness for a softer, more docile phenotype.
XenotypeDef.descriptionShort: S'Lanter-derived companion strain with raccoon traits, social bonding, and human compatibility.
